projects.name: Date-Time Library
projects.description: Rust temporal modeling library with variable precision, interval reasoning (Allen algebra), time zones, leap seconds, and Python bindings.
highlights: Interval reasoning using Allen interval algebra and 3-valued logic
Leap second handling using IERS data
Parsing, validation, normalization of temporal values
Unit tests for edge cases and temporal logic

projects.name: HKR Beauty Salon
projects.description: Fullstack salon booking platform with auth, booking system, email notifications, and loyalty features.
highlights: MongoDB models for users, bookings, services, employees
REST APIs for core modules and admin

projects.name: Smart House Backend
projects.description: REST API backend for smart home device control with secure authentication.
highlights: IoT device control via API commands

projects.name: Combitech Android Application
projects.description: Android app built with clean architecture, MVVM, DI, and modern Android practices.
highlights: Repository pattern with separation of concerns
Room local storage and Retrofit API integration

projects.name: CV Search App
projects.description: Job search platform with AI-powered CV/cover letter generation and PDF export.
highlights: REST API with filtering, sorting, pagination
AI CV and cover letter generation via Ollama
User profile system with structured JSON data
